allow: Bash(claude mcp add taskmaster-ai -- npx -y task-master-ai)

hooks.prompt: Review conversation for mistakes. Read .claude/rules/common-mistakes.md. If < 100 lines and you find a NEW mistake pattern (failed command, user correction), append a row to the appropriate table. Output a single line: 'No new mistakes' OR 'Added: [description]' OR 'Skipped: file >= 100 lines'
